steps.t: Winsig and Gísling are outside the Mead Hall of Snowbourn. Having defeated the evil Crúmgam and seen Fastred's son returned to safety, you should spea…
Gísil is outside the Mead Hall of Snowbourn. You should return to Gísil and let him know that you have spoken with Gísling and Winsig.
Fastred can be found inside the Mead Hall of Snowbourn. Gísil told you to speak with Fastred.
